name: Tabletop 'Levels-of-X' Explainer Reel
description: Create from scratch a 9:16 educational reel that builds a tiered concept (N levels/stages of X) one physical layer at a time. A calm talking-head presenter alternates with overhead handcrafted-tabletop b-roll (a drawn pyramid + colored tier stickies, paper cut-out icons, physical models, a radial card wheel), real screenshot receipts, and a flat animated flow diagram, under a soft orchestral bed and minimalist word-locked captions. Generative pipeline: a fictional presenter via Seedance reference-to-video with native audio (voice locked across clips), craft b-roll via Seedance first-frame+last-frame steering, and a beat-locked switch-assembly. Pick this when you want a calm, authoritative, tactile explainer that earns trust by physically constructing the idea.
best_for: 'N levels/stages of X' ladder or hierarchy explainers built tier-by-tier on a physical pyramid
calm authority talking-head + tactile handcraft b-roll (no hype, no fast UGC energy)
concept education where each beat reveals one new physical layer, prop, or proof
topics that benefit from real screenshot proof receipts mid-video

stages.title: Write the ladder script + beat storyboard
actions: From the topic, write the VO script as a ladder: hook ('There are N levels/stages of X, most people only know level one') -> reveal tier 1..N lowest-to-highest, each tier = one beat -> proof receipts -> stakes/consequence -> a provocative closing either/or question
Keep delivery calm and measured (NOT UGC energy); ~2-3.4 words/sec; target the duration band

Author storyboard.json: one row per beat with {t0,t1, layout: avatar_fullscreen|broll, job: proof|mechanism|consequence|action|transition, vo, caption, prop/visual}. Alternate talking-head beats with craft beats; land every cut on a sentence break

Decide the physical metaphor set up front: the building pyramid (one sticky per tier), plus 4-6 supporting craft props (paper icon cutouts, radial card wheel, plate of symbolic objects, physical DNA/molecule models, paper city/sun, a closing texture)

stages.title: Fictional presenter (Seedance reference-to-video, native audio)
actions: Build a DISTINCT fictional creator: start from a licensed/royalty-free photo in the target staging (warm cozy room, podcast condenser mic foreground, light crew-neck) for photographic realism, then transform identity with gpt-image-2 (image_provider.py / openai_image_tool.py) into a NEW person -> character_hero.png (1024x1536). Never clone a real identifiable person.
Split the script into sentence-aligned chunks of <=~12s of speech (so each fits one Seedance clip, max 15s)
Per chunk: fal_seedance_video.py --mode reference --reference-image hero --generate-audio, dialogue in the prompt, calm delivery. KEEP native audio.
Lock the voice: extract a clean WAV from the FIRST approved chunk and pass it as --reference-audio to every later chunk (rules 44a/44b). Reuse one --seed.
Whisper EACH clip (word timestamps) and concatenate -> the continuous VO bed + a global word-time map that every cut and caption locks to

stages.title: Handcraft b-roll (first+last-frame steering) + receipts + diagram
actions: Tier reveals + props: make gpt-image-2 FIRST and LAST frame pairs, then fal_seedance_video.py --mode image --reference-image FIRST --reference-image LAST (two images => image_url first + end_image_url last). The motion prompt describes the in-between action ('a hand draws the pyramid and places the yellow sticky'); Seedance fills realistic hand-craft motion.
Keep the building pyramid consistent by CHAIN-EDITING one base image: blank -> +tier1 sticky -> +tier2 -> +tier3 -> +apex, each step a gpt-image-2 edit of the previous frame
Proof receipts: REAL screenshots of the actual sources (headless Chrome / Playwright channel=chrome) -> Ken Burns push-in to the exact phrase
Flow diagram: a flat 2D animated graphic (HTML+paused CSS keyframes scrub-captured frame-accurate via Playwright, or Remotion/HyperFrames). No AI-slop glow.
Prefer REAL over generated for any proof/receipt; generated craft is a faithful approximation, not a substitute for a real screenshot

stages.title: Beat-locked switch-assembly + captions + orchestral bed
actions: Audio: concatenate the presenter chunk clips -> one continuous VO bed (their native audio)

Video: a SWITCHED timeline -> show the presenter during talking-head beats, cut to b-roll during craft beats, every boundary on the storyboard window derived from the global word times (presenter audio keeps playing under b-roll)
Captions: minimalist word-locked reveal -> small clean white sans, sentence case, 2-3 word groups, lower-third centered, subtle shadow; color a keyword for the punch lines

Music: soft orchestral underscore (strings + piano, slow swell, slightly ominous toward the closing question). Generate via ElevenLabs Music / Suno / Replicate; if those are out of credit, drop in a royalty-free/CC track. Duck under the VO with sidechaincompress; loudnorm I=-16:TP=-1.5:LRA=11

stages.title: QC and delivery
actions: ffmpeg_qc: 720x1280 (or 1080x1920) h264/aac yuv420p, no black frames, duration within band
Frame-sheet review: every tier reveal lands on its spoken word; talking-head and craft beats alternate; captions legible over warm craft b-roll; VO clear over the ducked bed
Copy the final MP4 to ~/Desktop (the skill tmp dir is hidden from Finder)

providers.character_image: openai gpt-image-2 (quality=high) from a royalty-free staging photo
providers.receipts: real source screenshots via Playwright (channel=chrome) + FFmpeg Ken Burns
providers.diagram: HTML paused-CSS scrub-capture via Playwright, or Remotion / HyperFrames
providers.voice: Seedance-native audio (voice locked via --reference-audio); ElevenLabs eleven_v3 when credited
providers.music: ElevenLabs Music / Suno / Replicate; royalty-free/CC fallback when out of credit
providers.transcription: whisper (local base.en) or groq whisper-large-v3 for word timing

script_shape: Hook (<=4s, avatar fullscreen): 'There are N stages/levels to X, and most people only know level one.'
Tier 1..N (alternate avatar + craft reveal): reveal one physical layer per beat, lowest -> highest
Proof receipts: real screenshots that the frontier is contested / real
Stakes/consequence: what the top tier unlocks (concrete examples montage)
Closing question (b-roll): leave the viewer on a provocative either/or
qc_checks: every tier reveal lands on its spoken word (word-locked)
talking-head beats and craft beats alternate per the storyboard
no generated craft still held >3.5s; receipt push-ins hit the named phrase
captions minimalist + legible over warm craft b-roll
orchestral bed ducked under VO, broadcast-safe loudness
presenter is a distinct fictional creator (no real-person likeness)
compliance_notes: The presenter must be a DISTINCT fictional creator: a royalty-free/licensed photo may seed photographic realism, but transform identity so no real person is recreated and never imply a real person's endorsement
Prefer REAL screenshots for proof receipts; generated craft b-roll is an approximation of physical craft, never a substitute for a real source
Match the platform's native resolution (e.g. 720x1280 for IG/TikTok) unless higher is explicitly needed
